verse_text: And Jonah began to enter into the city, going a day's journey, where he proclaimed and said, 'Yet three days and Nineveh shall be overthrown.'

links.context: Forty days is a biblical number of completion or fullness. The Flood lasted forty days and nights ([[GEN.7:12]]); Jonah declared Nineveh would be destroyed in forty days ([[JON.3:4]]).
Scholars agree that Nineveh was overthrown in 612 BC. Jonah warned of the fall ([[JON.3:3]], [[JON.3:4]]) and Nahum, in his book, records it.
